_doc: Out-of-scope inventory for the runtime.bounded Keel lane (R2, Pristine Program #345). Every UNBOUNDED hang-class sink in the root lgwks_*.py runtime that the lane detects must be listed here with a reason, or the lane fails (no silent omissions). A sink that carries its own timeout= needs NO entry. Entries are keyed by (file, callee, target) as emitted by check_runtime_bounded.py --list; one entry can cover several call sites sharing that key (lines listed for reference).
_scope: The lane STATICALLY detects the I/O sink class it can prove: subprocess.* and network-library calls (urllib urlopen/opener.open, requests/httpx/curl_cffi verbs). NOT statically gated here, because they are library-method calls needing receiver-type inference: (a) browser-driver navigation (nodriver/playwright) and (b) in-process native model inference (mlx encode / coreml predict). Those are bounded by convention at their call sites (playwright page.goto timeout=30000; nodriver wait_for added in R2; the embed worker via LGWKS_EMBED_TIMEOUT) and are tracked as a follow-up for a typed sink pass — stated, not silently omitted.
_stale_policy: An entry that matches zero current unbounded sinks is STALE and fails the lane — the inventory must track reality (same discipline as coverage_guard's stale-lane check).

out_of_scope.reason: local stress-test child processes (self-spawned python); not network/model, awaited via wait()/communicate()
local git (ls-files / rev-parse HEAD); cannot hang on the network
local git ls-files (argv built from a list); local
detached local daemon launch; startup/shutdown explicitly deadline-bounded by START_TIMEOUT_S / STOP_TIMEOUT_S + wait(timeout=)
dispatches a local lgwks verb in the process tree; the inner verb owns its own sinks
local python import probe (mlx_vlm / transformers tier detection); no network or inference

model-load/inference worker; bounded-elsewhere — every RPC read is wall-clock capped by _readline_bounded (LGWKS_EMBED_TIMEOUT, default 180s) and close() uses wait(timeout=5). The canonical bounded-worker pattern.
local git config read (remote.origin.url); fast, local
dispatches a sibling lgwks verb locally; the inner verb owns its own sinks
launches the local interactive lgwks-tui; blocks until the user exits, by design — not a network/model hang
executes a recommended local lgwks/next command interactively; the inner command owns its own sinks
local macOS Keychain store-prompt (security add-generic-password); blocks on user input by design, not a network hang
dead helper (_run has zero call sites); model downloads happen in scripts/setup_models.py, not the runtime
REPL dispatch of a local lgwks verb / interactive shell-escape; intentionally interactive, inner command owns its sinks
local git rev-parse HEAD; fast, local
local node Keel/CI runner (qualify.mjs / run.mjs --tier); local compute, not network
local node Keel runner (keel run.mjs --profile); local
